dailyNews.title: Pakistan jibes become central to BJP’s Assam poll narrative
dailyNews.description: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has been attacking Congress leader Gaurav Gogoi over his alleged Pakistan connections, his latest barb was aimed at the mother of a candidate whom he accused of sympathising with ‘anti-national’ elements

dailyNews.title: Tesla’s Texas factory workforce reportedly shrunk 22% in 2025
dailyNews.description: Tesla's headcount fell from 21,191 workers to 16,506 workers in 2025, according to a report, as it grappled with its second straight year of declining sales.

dailyNews.title: Meet the elite US teams tasked with combat rescues
dailyNews.description: Air Force Pararescue units who specialise in CSAR missions are among the most highly trained in the US military.

dailyNews.title: Survivors of Iran bridge attack recall terror of US-Israeli strike
dailyNews.description: Survivors of an Israeli-US attack on Iran’s biggest road bridge have spoken of their terror as missiles hit it.

dailyNews.title: Amit Shah promises UCC in Assam with exemptions for tribal communities
dailyNews.description: Amit Shah promotes BJP's return in Assam, pledging a Uniform Civil Code while excluding tribals, and accuses Congress of neglecting tribal welfare.

dailyNews.title: A decade and 61 cases later, SC grants divorce to end matrimonial dispute
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court resolved a decade-long matrimonial dispute, granting divorce and settling all claims between the couple while quashing 61 related cases.

dailyNews.title: For some around Trump, war on Iran is a Christian calling
dailyNews.description: Religion is playing a role in the US conflict with Iran. President Donald Trump has met with Christian pastors who offered blessings. Some officials view the conflict as a divine mission. This echoes historical religious wars. Iran's government is also religiously rooted. The US is invoking religious themes in its foreign policy.

dailyNews.title: Iran Refuses To Meet US Officials In Pak, Ceasefire Efforts Hit Wall: Report
dailyNews.description: The push, led by Pakistan, has failed to yield a breakthrough, with Tehran formally notifying mediators that it is unwilling to send officials to Islamabad for talks in the coming days.

dailyNews.title: Two-worded message & an old pic - Vanessa Trump breaks her silence on boyfriend Tiger Woods' crash, DUI arrest
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods made his and Vanessa Trump's relationship public on Instagram in March 2025

dailyNews.title: US unemployment rate drops despite economic uncertainty and Iran war
dailyNews.description: White House says March jobs report 'blew out expectations' with gains made in the healthcare and construction sectors.

dailyNews.title: One crew member rescued by special forces says US officials after Iran shoots down American F-15 fighter jet
dailyNews.description: Most Americans favor a swift end to US involvement in the conflict, according to a recent poll. The downing of an F-15E fighter jet in Iran led to one crew member's rescue, with ongoing concerns about potential US military personnel capture affecting public opinion.

dailyNews.title: NATO Chief To Visit US Next Week Amid Trump's Threat To Quit Alliance
dailyNews.description: Trump has suggested he is considering quitting the 77-year-old military alliance due to the response by European nations to his war.

dailyNews.title: What we know about the US fighter jet shot down in Iran
dailyNews.description: The White House has confirmed Donald Trump has been briefed on the shooting down of a US fighter jet in Iran.

dailyNews.title: 'Capture Enemy Pilots Alive': Iran Channel Issues Reward After US Jet Downed
dailyNews.description: An Iranian channel announced a reward for civilians if the pilots were captured and handed over to the police and military forces.

dailyNews.title: US rescues one crew member of F-15E fighter jet shot down by Iran; Tehran asks for civilian help: Report
dailyNews.description: According to the reports, Israel is helping the US with search and rescue operation of the crew member.

dailyNews.title: WHO Confirms Over 20 Strikes On Iranian Health Facilities As Global Alarm Grows
dailyNews.description: Neither the US nor Israel has publicly commented on the specific strikes against medical facilities.

dailyNews.title: French-owned container ship transits Hormuz Strait in first since Iran war
dailyNews.description: CMA CGM's vessel becomes the first French-owned ship to traverse Hormuz since the US–Israel war on Iran began.

dailyNews.title: US deports eight people 'of African origin' to Uganda
dailyNews.description: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".

topStories.description: The request for defence spending is the largest in decades and accompanies cuts to domestic programmes.

topStories.title: Trump seeks massive $1.5tn for defence alongside cuts in domestic spending
topStories.description: The president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

topStories.title: Trump set to sign executive order on college sports to regain control of NIL
topStories.description: President Donald Trump plans to sign a second executive order for college sports that is reportedly aimed at expanding NCAA control over athletes and NIL issues.

topStories.description: President Donald Trump is signaling his continued confidence in Vice President JD Vance by having him address an “unprecedented" problem and officially declaring him the “fraud czar."

dailyNews.title: Vance tapped as ‘fraud czar’ as Trump targets blue states over taxpayer theft
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is signaling his continued confidence in Vice President JD Vance by having him address an “unprecedented" problem and officially declaring him the “fraud czar."

dailyNews.title: Pritzker calls on Trump officials to testify over ICE crackdown, White House blasts move as ‘political stunt’
dailyNews.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker calls on Trump administration officials to testify before his commission targeting ICE enforcement operations in the state.

dailyNews.title: Trump Seeks $152 Million to Begin to Turn Alcatraz Back Into a Prison
dailyNews.description: The plan faces significant local political opposition and the dilapidated state of the site poses considerable logistical challenges.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Is Doing to the English Language
dailyNews.description: There is a morality to verbs, especially in political speech.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens civilian infrastructure in Iran after it downed a U.S. fighter jet
dailyNews.description: It has been over a month since the war in Iran began, and President Trump is now threatening attacks on civilian infrastructure. This comes after strikes destroyed an Iranian bridge on Thursday. CBS News Middle East contributor Courtney Kealy reports.

dailyNews.title: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore: U.S. is "lurching again into another forever war"
dailyNews.description: In an interview with CBS News' Ed O'Keefe, Moore said President Trump has yet to articulate what the U.S. is doing in Iran.

dailyNews.title: 23 states sue Trump over new executive order targeting mail voting
dailyNews.description: Officials from 23 states and the District of Columbia filed a lawsuit seeking to block President Trump's executive order that aims to restrict mail voting.

dailyNews.title: Cuba says it released over 2,000 prisoners as White House heaps pressure on island
dailyNews.description: The Cuban government says it has pardoned and released 2,010 prisoners, a sweeping move that comes as the island nation grapples with pressure from the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump to sign executive order to expand NCAA's control over college sports
dailyNews.description: The executive order is expected to increase the NCAA's control over college sports and threaten to remove federal funding for colleges and universities that don't comply with NCAA rules.

dailyNews.title: White House reacts to F-15E fighter jet downed over Iran
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed after an American fighter jet was downed in Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.
